title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at HP India
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
jsonLd.skills: Docker, TypeScript, Agile/Scrum, TensorFlow, Node.js, JavaScript, AWS, Machine Learning
